patch.value: Source-tree folder-density program: bounded directory fan-out via domain-noun subfolders (zero feature loss)

Inter-file half of the 2026-07-12 too-many/too-long directive (intra-file LOC half = pm-yh8r): regroup high-fan-out directories (src/cli/commands 72, tests/unit/commands 60, tests/integration 32, scripts 23, src/cli 19) into domain-noun subfolders per the disposition blueprint in the body, in 6 fenced tranches.

Every tracked source directory holds ≤~20 direct files or carries a documented exemption in this body; all moves land as import-specifier-only refactors with full gates green per tranche and byte-identical CLI/MCP/contract surface; pm files links updated for moved paths on open items in the same tranche; vitest/eslint-suppressions/coverage/package.json/workflow/docs references updated within the moving tranche

## Why (2026-07-12 maintainer directive: too many files per folder + too-long files; document-only pass)
The intra-file effective-LOC half of this directive class is owned by pm-yh8r (census current as of its 2026-07-12 note; sdk/runtime.ts 3388/3400 is #1 at-risk). THIS item owns the inter-file half: tracked-file fan-out per source directory. Census (git ls-files, direct children only):

- src/cli/commands 72 (~55 command modules interleaved with ~17 cross-command helper modules; `extension/` and `test/` subfolders already exist as grouping precedent)
- tests/unit/commands 60 (mirror of the above)
- tests/integration 32 · scripts 23 · tests/unit/scripts 23 · src/cli 19 · src/core/shared 18 · docs 18 · src/sdk 16 · src/core/item 16 · src/core/extensions 16 · tests/helpers 16

OUT OF SCOPE: `.agents/pm/**` fan-out (history 1758, tasks 567, issues 397) — tracker-store bucketing is owned by pm-0qg5 (format_version-gated migration); never double-file.

## Target policy
- Soft ceiling ~20 direct files per source directory; exceedances need a grouping move or a documented exemption in this body.
- Group by DOMAIN NOUN (align with the pm-n7rr grammar nouns), never by file kind — no `utils/`/`helpers/` dumping grounds; a single `shared/` module folder per level is the one sanctioned exception.
- Tests mirror src 1:1 — every src move carries its mirrored spec move in the same commit.

## Disposition blueprint (per directory)
1. src/cli/commands (72 → ≤20 root + noun subfolders):
   - Cross-command support → `commands/shared/`: event-validation-messages, item-filter-options, legacy-none-tokens, lifecycle-transitions, linked-artifacts, linked-test-entry, linked-test-parsers, list-filter-shared, metadata-normalizers, mutation-command-options, recurrence-parsers, repeatable-metadata-parsers, scheduling-shortcuts, search-pagination, search-rendering, shared-unset-fields, init-agent-guidance.
   - Noun families into per-noun folders (extension/ + test/ precedent): `history/` (history, history-compact, history-redact, history-repair) · `test/` (test, test-all, test-runs joining existing linked-command-detection) · `annotations/` (notes, learnings, comments, comments-audit) · `maintenance/` (normalize, reindex, gc, dedupe-audit, dedupe-merge).
   - Remaining single-verb modules stay at root.
2. src/cli (19 direct): help family (help-content, help-json-payload, guide-topics, commander-usage, error-guidance) → `cli/help/`; parser family (shared-parsers, argv-utils, bootstrap-args) → `cli/parsing/`; register-* + registration-helpers stay (registration IS this folder's identity); main.ts stays (entry point, wired in package/bin).
3. scripts (23 direct): smoke-*.mjs + plugin-mcp-smoke-harness.mjs → `scripts/smoke/`; release-version.mjs, generate-release-notes.mjs, sync-versions.mjs → `scripts/release/`; bundle-cli.mjs, prepare-build-cache.mjs, finalize-build.mjs, gen-*.mjs → `scripts/build/`; run-tests.mjs + install.sh/install.ps1 + check-secrets*.mjs STAY at root (README curl paths, CI invocations, contributor muscle memory) — verify EVERY consumer (package.json scripts, .github/workflows, docs, other scripts) before moving any script.
4. tests/integration (32): group by surface — `cli/`, `mcp/`, `extensions/`, `release/`, `telemetry/`; tests/unit/scripts follows the scripts/ regrouping mirror.
5. AT-threshold, no move yet (re-evaluate at T6): src/core/shared 18 (it is the sanctioned shared level), src/sdk 16 (PR#396 barrel split + cli-contracts/ already relieved it; pm-usfg partition will re-shape it), src/core/item 16, src/core/extensions 16, tests/helpers 16.
6. docs 18: navigated via the AGENTS.md progressive-disclosure map, not by folder browsing — exempt.

## Constraints (why this is not a mechanical mv)
- Zero feature/behavior loss: bin entry, package exports, contract tables, MCP tool surface, completion output byte-identical; moves are import-specifier-only refactors.
- Sequencing fence: files inside the SDK-promotion partition (pm-usfg slices pm-3mna/pm-zwpp/pm-oxrw/pm-4a7m/pm-oslr) and pm-yh8r decomposition targets move WITH their slice/split, never in a separate churn pass — one migration per file, no double conflict surface against active lanes.
- Reference-churn checklist per tranche: ESM relative import specifiers (.js), vitest.config.ts path-keyed excludes (big legacy files listed by path), eslint-suppressions.json path keys (A+ source of truth, max 17), coverage literal all-src globs, package.json script paths, .github/workflows script invocations, docs command examples, jscpd/CodeFactor path baselines.
- pm tracked file-links: every moved path strands `pm files` links → files_missing rises above the 155/122 baseline owned by pm-j8z6. Each tranche updates links on OPEN items it touches; closed-item drift is handed to the pm-j8z6 reconciliation (CREATE-ONLY on closed items — never mutate them).
- `git mv` per file for rename detection; ONE directory family per PR tranche, each independently green through the full gate set.

## Tranche order (each tranche = one PR)
T1 scripts/ regrouping (lowest blast radius, zero src imports) → T2 tests/integration surface folders → T3 src/cli/commands `shared/` extraction → T4 src/cli/commands noun folders (excluding usfg/yh8r-fenced files) → T5 src/cli help/ + parsing/ → T6 re-census + threshold re-check after the pm-usfg partition lands.

author: maintainer-agent
message: Sibling program: yh8r owns intra-file LOC decomposition, kb5h owns inter-file folder fan-out

value.author: maintainer-agent
value.text: src/sdk fan-out census refresh 2026-07-15 (review pass #89; method: direct-children .ts count): src/sdk now has 46 FLAT top-level files — nearly 3x the 16 recorded in the body census of 2026-07-12 — plus the four existing sub-folders (cli-contracts/ 9, extension/ 11, governance/ 3, test/ 1); 70 files / ~52.5k raw LOC total. Growth driver is the pm-usfg promotion slices themselves (each lane lands new flat modules). Maintainer re-flagged sdk flatness explicitly on 2026-07-15 — the sdk tranche should move to the FRONT of the tranche order. Natural 8-cluster grouping mapped this pass (aligns with usfg slice nouns and the existing sub-folder precedent): runtime/ (runtime, runtime-input, package-runtime-options, command-line, cli-program, output, invocation-author, author-attribution, start-task-status, workspace, workspace-contracts-cache, errors) · query/ (pagination, item-children, item-schedule, files, docs) · lifecycle/ (define, compose, init, init-agent-guidance, templates) · annotations/ (annotations, linked-artifacts) · history/ (history-compact/-read/-mcp/-redact/-repair) · relationships/ (relationships, relationship-analytics/-context/-history, dependencies, dependency-flag-validation) · context/ (context-relevance/-packing/-usage) · schema/ (schema, config, profile) — index.ts + cli-contracts.ts shim stay at root; package-import-adapters.ts joins extension/ or a packages/ cluster. NOTE the "plan" cluster has no flat-file home (plan logic lives in core/profile, re-exported via profile.ts) — confirm the tranche blueprint's folder set covers it so nothing is orphaned. Fence unchanged: yh8r/usfg target files move WITH their split/slice. Other deltas: src/cli/commands 66 direct .ts children (was 72 — improving), src/cli 20, src/core/shared 18.

value.author: maintainer-agent
value.text: Third maintainer recurrence 2026-07-15 (review pass #89): the too-many-files directive re-issued with src/sdk flatness called out EXPLICITLY ("no sub-folder in the sdk folder and its getting very confusing"). Combined with sdk/runtime.ts hitting the 3400 gate at zero headroom (pm-yh8r note same day), the sdk tranche moves to the FRONT of the tranche order as T0 (8-cluster grouping mapped in this item's 2026-07-15 note). Rider for T0: once domain folders exist, evaluate mirroring them as package.json subpath exports (./sdk/relationships, ./sdk/governance already precedented by ./sdk/runtime + ./sdk/testing) so package authors deep-import by domain instead of the 935-line index.ts barrel — decide within T0, not as a separate item. Priority bumped 2->1 on the recurrence + the yh8r sequencing coupling.

author: maintainer-agent
message: Priority 2->1: third maintainer recurrence of the folder-density directive (2026-07-15), sdk flatness named explicitly; sdk tranche promoted to T0

value.author: maintainer-agent
value.text: T0 external-safety clearance (pass #90, 2026-07-15): org-wide code search confirms every external consumer (pm-graph, pm-web, pm-github, pm-changelog, companion examples) and every in-repo package runtime imports ONLY the official subpath exports (./sdk, ./sdk/runtime, ./sdk/testing, ./cli) — zero deep dist/ imports anywhere. The T0 sdk folder reorganization cannot break external packages as long as the package.json exports map stays stable; the per-domain subpath-exports rider EXTENDS this verified contract rather than introducing new risk.
